they base their conclusions on code structure and behavior.\n   - They correctly identify the code as standard and autogenerated, with no suspicious elements.\n\n7. **Score Consistency:**\n   - The scores across reports are consistent and reasonable.\n   - The low malware and security risk scores are justified by the straightforward, boilerplate nature of the code.\n\n---\n\n### Final Assessment:\n\n- **Malware Score:** **0** — No malicious behavior detected.\n- **Obfuscated Score:** **0** — Code is clear, autogenerated boilerplate.\n- **Risk Score:** **0.1** — Very low, typical for a standard contract interface factory.\n\n### Additional Notes:\n- Since this code is purely a factory for contract interaction, it inherently carries minimal risk.\n- No evidence suggests any malicious intent or security flaw.\n- The overall evaluation aligns with the reports’ findings.\n\n**Conclusion:**  \nThis code is a benign, autogenerated interface factory for an Ethereum smart contract, with no malware, obfuscation, or significant security risk.",
